allow: PowerShell(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 3306 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'mysql|mariadb' } | Format-Table Name,Status,StartType -AutoSize)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\data"\) { Copy-Item "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\data" "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\data_backup_$\(Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd_HHmmss\)" -Recurse; Write-Output "Backup done" } else { Write-Output "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\data not found - check your XAMPP install path" })
